# WaterProofX

> India's first AI-powered, engineered waterproofing service, based in Bangalore.
> Terrace, bathroom, swimming pool, water tank, exterior wall and dampness leak
> repair with certified application and a brand-backed up to 10-year written warranty.
> Free instant cost calculator, free AI photo diagnosis, free on-site engineering
> inspection, lowest-price guarantee, court-proof frozen quotes.

## Facts
- Name: WaterProofX. Site: https://waterproofx.in
- Service area: Bangalore — Whitefield, HSR Layout, Koramangala, Indiranagar, Sarjapur Road, Electronic City, JP Nagar, Hebbal, Marathahalli, Bannerghatta Road, Jayanagar, Yelahanka, and all localities.
- Rating: 4.9/5 from 247+ reviews. Warranty: up to 10 years, written + digital card.
- Free engineering inspection within 24–48h. Brands: Dr. Fixit, Fosroc, Sika, MYK Laticrete.

## Services and indicative cost (Bangalore, severity/system dependent)
- Terrace & roof waterproofing: ₹35–₹90/sq ft — https://waterproofx.in/services/terrace
- Bathroom waterproofing (often no tile demolition): ₹90–₹180/sq ft — https://waterproofx.in/services/bathroom
- Swimming pool waterproofing: ₹120–₹220/sq ft — https://waterproofx.in/services/swimming-pool
- Water tank waterproofing (food-safe): ₹60–₹140/sq ft — https://waterproofx.in/services/water-tank
- Exterior wall waterproofing: ₹30–₹85/sq ft — https://waterproofx.in/services/exterior-wall
- Dampness treatment & others: ₹25–₹70/sq ft — https://waterproofx.in/services/dampness

## Why WaterProofX
- AI photo diagnosis identifies the root cause, not just the symptom.
- Instrument-based engineering inspection (moisture mapping, slope, crack survey) before any quote.
- Genuine authorised-distributor materials; certified applicators; itemised transparent pricing.
- Accepted quote price is frozen (court-proof snapshot) and never revised later.

## Key pages
- / : home, services overview, free cost calculator, AI diagnosis, FAQ
- /services/{terrace|bathroom|swimming-pool|water-tank|exterior-wall|dampness} : per-service detail, cost, process, FAQ
- /app : web app — tools and customer/crew/admin dashboards
- /app/diagnose : AI photo diagnosis · /app/calculator : instant cost · /app/book : free inspection

## Common questions
- "How much does waterproofing cost in Bangalore?" -> ₹25–₹250/sq ft by area type and system; terrace ₹35–₹90, bathroom ₹90–₹180, basement ₹120–₹250.
- "How long does it last?" -> 8–15 years professionally applied; up to 10-year written warranty.
- "Bathroom without breaking tiles?" -> Yes in most minor/moderate cases via nano-injection grouting.
